name: dos_high_acc
prompt_template: For {material_context}, use a full workflow consisting of: 1) vc-relax, 2) scf, 3) nscf, 4) pw.x calculation="bands", 5) band post-processing, and 6) DOS post-processing. Require a strict energy convergence of 1 meV/atom. {parameter_context}. {pseudopotential_text}. Do not need to explicitly return band structure. Just finish the calculation.
